allow: SlashCommand(/scout codebase structure for VIETconsult website project)

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Complete VIETconsult website implementation - All phases (01-13)

✨ Features:
- Homepage with 10 animated sections (Hero, Vision, Services, Team, Benefits, Partners, Process, Infrastructure, Specialized Areas, CTA)
- About Us page (Company intro, Mission, Values, Team, Why Vietnam)
- Partner page (talentsCARE integration with 9 services)
- Advantages page (6 core benefits with stats)
- Quality Seal page (KDA Gütezeichen with 6 international standards)
- Services overview page with 4 service categories
- Contact page (Form, 4 locations, hotlines)
- 4 service detail placeholder pages

🌐 Internationalization:
- Full i18n support (DE/EN/VI) with next-intl
- Hierarchical translation structure
- Language switcher component
- URL-based locale routing (/de, /en, /vi)

🎨 Design & UX:
- Framer Motion animations (fadeInUp, stagger, scroll-triggered)
- Responsive design (mobile-first, sm/md/lg/xl breakpoints)
- Custom design tokens (primary-blue, primary-red, primary-gold, slate-gray)
- shadcn/ui components (Card, Button, Input)
- Lucide React icons

🛠️ Tech Stack:
- Next.js 14+ (App Router)
- TypeScript (strict mode)
- Tailwind CSS
- next-intl v3+
- Framer Motion
- ESLint + Prettier

📝 Documentation:
- Project overview PDR
- Code standards
- Implementation plans (12 phases)
- Code review reports

All tests passing: TypeScript ✓ ESLint ✓
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Configure static export for GitHub Pages deployment

✨ Changes:
- Configure Next.js for static HTML export
- Add force-static to all pages for SSG
- Fix next-intl for static rendering compatibility
- Add GitHub Actions workflow for auto-deployment
- Support all 3 languages (DE/EN/VI) in static build

🔧 Configuration:
- next.config.mjs: output=''export'', basePath=''/Vietconsult''
- i18n: Use locale param instead of requestLocale
- Layout: Pass locale explicitly to getMessages
- Workflow: Auto-deploy on push to main

📦 Build Output:
- Static HTML for /de, /en, /vi routes
- All 11 pages × 3 languages = 33 static pages
- Optimized for GitHub Pages hosting

All tests passing: Build ✓ Type-check ✓
EOF
)")
